children.text: Zap Zones let you automatically share photos with a whole group of people.
Tap here and select New Zap Zone to begin.
Give your invitation a unique title, photo and code.
Swipe up, with two fingers, to send the invitation. Your friends will swipe down with two fingers to join.
Now all photos taken will automatically be shared in the Zap Zone.
You can end a Zap Zone here. This will stop auto-sharing for all guests.
